signin.title: Sign in
signin.subtitle: Welcome back. Enter your credentials to continue.

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter the email associated with your account and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.success: If that account exists, we've sent a password reset link. Check your inbox.
forgot.error: Couldn't send the reset email. Please try again.

reset.title: Reset your password
reset.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
reset.newPasswordHint: At least 8 characters. Avoid passwords used elsewhere.
reset.success: Password reset. You can sign in now.
reset.missingToken: This reset link is missing its token. Request a new link.
reset.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Request a new link.
reset.genericError: Couldn't reset the password. Please try again.

confirmEmail.title: Confirm your email change
confirmEmail.subtitle: Click confirm to apply the new email address to your account. You'll need to sign in again with the new email.
confirmEmail.success: Email updated. Sign in with your new email to continue.
confirmEmail.missingToken: This confirmation link is missing its token.
confirmEmail.invalidToken: This confirmation link is invalid or has expired.
confirmEmail.genericError: Couldn't confirm the email change. Please try again.

errors.unexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.

register.title: Create your workspace
register.subtitle: Set up your company workspace. You'll be the first admin.
register.slugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, dashes. 3–50 characters. Used in URLs.
register.legalNameHint: Your registered business name (as on PAN / GST).
register.displayNameHint: What we'll show in the app and emails.
register.adminEmailHint: Used to sign in. Must not already have an active workspace.
register.adminPasswordHint: At least 12 characters. Avoid passwords used elsewhere.
register.successBody: Sign in with your new admin email to continue.

errors.slugTaken: That workspace slug is already taken. Try another.
errors.slugInvalid: That slug isn't valid. Use lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes only.
errors.emailHasActiveMembership: That email already belongs to another workspace. Use a different email.
errors.unexpected: Couldn't create the workspace. Please try again.

security.title: Account & Security
security.subtitle: Manage your sign-in credentials. Changes take effect immediately and may sign you out of other devices.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.description: Pick a strong password you don't use elsewhere. We'll keep you signed in on this device.
changePassword.newPasswordHint: At least 8 characters. Must differ from your current password.

errors.incorrectCurrent: That doesn't match your current password.
errors.generic: Couldn't update your password. Please try again.

changeEmail.title: Change email
changeEmail.description: We'll send a confirmation link to the new address. Your current email keeps working until you click that link.
changeEmail.newEmailHint: Must not already be in use by another account.
changeEmail.success: Confirmation link sent. Click the link in your inbox at the new address to complete the change.

errors.alreadyTaken: Another account already uses this email.
errors.generic: Couldn't send the confirmation link. Please try again.
